publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-12-03 23:19:12 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Manuscripts submitted for publication which were rejected, withdrawn, or accepted, with referee reports.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Icarus is the international journal of solar system studies.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Manuscripts submitted for publication which were rejected, withdrawn, or accepted, with referee reports.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Icarus Records, #4412. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Records older than 50 years are not restricted. To access records less than 50 years, permission needs to be obtained by the Icarus Editor-in-Chief. Because the folders are not dated in the Icarus finding aid, please contact rareref@cornell.edu with the title of the specific folder you would like to see and a staff member will review the folder and let you know if it is restricted.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

did.unittitle: Series III. Withdrawn, Rejected, Inactive, and Incomplete
7573 - de la Torre Juarez, et al.
Series VI. Permanent Author Index and Permanent Control Card Files
